declaration.statement: Every analysis choice below (ensembles, measurement definitions, matching rule, fit windows, Z_V rule, envelope factor magnitudes, combination rule, bracket construction, containment rule) is declared in this file and hashed BEFORE the lattice moments, the hybrid interval, or the containment against S_required are evaluated. This file is not edited after the first evaluation; any forced amendment would be recorded as a separate file with both hashes.

frozen_inputs.evaluation_point: payload_harness.build_evaluation_point(precision=40), Stage-5 internal chain, no external empirical inputs

ensembles.central_rule: Central S_IR is taken from ensemble B (larger volume, longer time extent). Ensemble A is the statistics workhorse and cross-check; the A-versus-B spread is reported. If B fails to complete inside the compute budget, A becomes central and that substitution is stated in the artifact.
ensembles.thermalization_rule: Plaquette recorded every thermalization sweep; thermalization is accepted if the last 20 thermalization sweeps show no drift beyond 2 sigma of the measurement-chain plaquette scatter.
ensembles.autocorrelation_rule: Integrated autocorrelation time of the plaquette and of the per-configuration TMR moment over the measurement chain, Madras-Sokal window at 4*tau; jackknife errors are inflated by sqrt(2*tau_int) of the moment series when tau_int > 0.5.

measurement.correlator: Transverse local-local vector correlator, polarizations GAMMA[1],GAMMA[2],GAMMA[3] (the temporal channel GAMMA[0] is excluded; the pre-existing demo contraction averaged GAMMA[0..2] and thereby carried a factor 2/3 dilution, corrected here), single flavor, unit charge, color trace included.
measurement.folding: G(t) symmetrized about T/2 as in vector_correlator.fold_correlator.
measurement.kernel: t^2 kernel (a*mZ -> infinity limit of the contract kernel), moment M = 4*pi*sum_{t=0}^{T/2} G_folded(t)*t^2, per vector_correlator.tmr_moment(amz=None).
measurement.hopping_normalization: Physical moment = hopping moment / (2*kappa)^2 for each lattice measurement (interacting and free reference).
measurement.z_v_rule: Z_V^eff(t) = C_CL(t)/(2*kappa*C_LL(t)) with C_CL the conserved(sink)-local(source) transverse correlator (exactly conserved point-split Noether current; Ward identity verified numerically off-source). Z_V = plain mean of Z_V^eff(t) over the plateau window t in [3, T/2-1] on folded correlators; per-t values outside (0.2, 1.2) are flagged in the artifact, never silently altered. The renormalized interacting moment is Z_V^2 * M_LL.
measurement.vector_mass_rule: a*m_V from the folded transverse correlator, effective mass log(G(t)/G(t+1)), plain mean over the declared window t in [3, T/2-1] restricted to the contiguous positive-correlator range starting at t=3; jackknife over configurations.
measurement.free_reference_rule: Free-field (cold gauge) lattice measurement on the SAME shape and c_SW, at kappa_free fixed by the matching rule below, same contraction, same folding, same kernel window, physical normalization /(2*kappa_free)^2. An infinite-volume continuum free-parton reference is reported as context only and enters nothing (finite-volume phase-space discreteness makes it incommensurable at these volumes).
measurement.matching_rule: 2 * am_q_free = a*m_V(measured), with the free Wilson pole mass am_q(kappa) = log(1 + 1/(2*kappa) - 4); kappa_free = 0.5/(exp(am_V/2) - 1 + 4).
measurement.s_ir_definition: S_IR = [Z_V^2 * M_LL / (2*kappa)^2] / [M_free(kappa_free) / (2*kappa_free)^2]. Statistical error by jackknife over configurations with the free-reference m_V dependence propagated linearly through dM_free/dm_V measured from free solves at m_V +/- 0.05 in lattice units.
measurement.pion_correlator: Measured and reported for context (a*m_PS); enters no number in the bracket.

envelope.form: S_IR interval = S_IR_central * [1 - E_total, 1 + E_total], with S_IR_lo clamped at 0.0 from below (the below-cutoff spectral density is nonnegative).
envelope.combination_rule: E_total = quadrature sum sqrt(sum_i e_i^2) of the declared relative factors below plus the measured statistical relative error.

factors.e_stat: measured jackknife relative error on S_IR of the central ensemble (rule, not a number; inflated per the autocorrelation rule)

e_z_v.motivation: Z_V^2 from the conserved-local estimator carries O(a) local-conserved contamination and excited-state pollution at the coarse coupling g^2 = 6/5.7; nonperturbative-vs-perturbative Z_V determinations for coarse Wilson/clover actions differ at the 10-15 percent level on Z_V, taken generously as 30 percent on Z_V^2.

e_quenching.motivation: quenched versus 2+1-flavor vector-channel spectral quantities differ at the 10-15 percent level in literature comparisons of light vector observables and HVP-type moments.

e_discretization.motivation: single coarse lattice spacing at beta 5.7 with tree-level c_SW = 1 and hopping (2*kappa) normalization in place of a tadpole-improved scheme; generous single-spacing envelope, no continuum limit.

e_finite_volume.motivation: spatial extents 4^3 and 6^3 in lattice units; free-reference matching cancels tree-level phase-space discreteness only partially.

e_transfer.motivation: duality transfer: the interacting-over-free moment ratio is measured at the heavy demo mass point on the full lattice spectral support and applied to the contract's below-cutoff light-quark region [y_thr, y0]; covers the mass-point mismatch and the support mismatch.

e_kernel.motivation: t^2 kernel in place of the a*mZ contract kernel (relative 4/(a*mZ)^2 for t >= 1 on any coarse lattice) plus the finite-T truncation of the TMR sum at T/2.

bracket_construction.grid: The frozen pqcd grid exactly as declared_grid() in ward_projected_payload/run_bracket.py defines it: Lambda3 in {lane_lo, lane_central, lane_hi} x k_cut in {2, 4, 8} x order in {1, 2, 3}. The above-cutoff treatment is untouched: Delta_above(Lambda3, k, order) = Delta_had of the frozen module pqcd(below='zero') via payload_harness.emit_delta_source with gauss_n=48, splits_per_decade=4.
bracket_construction.ir_replacement: Delta_IR_free(Lambda3, k) = sum_q parton_moment(y_thr_q, N_c Q_q^2, y_lo=y_thr_q, y_hi=y0) with y0 = (k*Lambda3/mZ)^2, i.e. exactly the frozen below='free' minus below='zero' difference. The below-cutoff dichotomy factor {0, 1} is replaced by the measured interval: S_eff_new = (Delta_above + S_IR * Delta_IR_free) / Delta_quark_naive, evaluated at S_IR in {S_IR_lo, S_IR_hi}.
bracket_construction.row_exclusions: parton_free and constituent reference branches of the old bracket are not rows of the hybrid bracket; their role (spanning the IR treatment) is superseded by the measured IR interval. Stated here before evaluation.
bracket_construction.bracket: hybrid s_effective interval = [min, max] over the 54 evaluated values (27 grid points x 2 envelope edges); consistency identity Delta_zero + 1.0*Delta_IR_free = Delta_free is checked against the frozen artifact rows to 1e-9 before use.

containment_rule.check: S_required inside [s_lo, s_hi] of the hybrid bracket; also reported: distance from S_required to the nearest edge, hybrid width versus old width, hybrid width in Delta_source alpha^-1 units versus the 2.1e-8 pass tolerance, and the equivalent relative width on Delta_had versus the 4.04e-9 relative pass tolerance.
containment_rule.honesty_clause: If the interval is wider than the old bracket or excludes S_required, that outcome is reported as-is.

lattice_ir_measurement.central_rule_applied: Central S_IR is taken from ensemble B (larger volume, longer time extent). Ensemble A is the statistics workhorse and cross-check; the A-versus-B spread is reported. If B fails to complete inside the compute budget, A becomes central and that substitution is stated in the artifact.
declared_deviations: ensemble B (24x6^3, declared n_cfg 20, seed 716002) did not complete inside the wall-clock budget: the first attempt was restarted with a declared budget truncation to 10 configurations and the restarted process died at configuration 8 of 10 before its cache was written; no durable B data exists, so per the spec central rule ensemble A is central and B is absent from this artifact

spec amendment hybrid_ir_bracket_envelope_spec_amendment_2026-07-16.json (sha256 382596e828b7bb259a253418d5ffc8bc611e0a06b61ebd693f666a03721f50ba): cosh effective mass in place of the plain log ratio, fixed from the free-field anchor before any interacting evaluation
lattice_ir_measurement.known_dilution_note: the pre-existing demo contraction (GAMMA[0..2]) carries a factor 2/3 temporal-channel dilution relative to the per-polarization transverse correlator; this analysis uses the three transverse channels GAMMA[1..3]

evaluation_point.p_provenance: internal fixed-point root of the implemented Stage-5 chain (mode thomson_structured_running); rebuilt D10 point via paper_math.PaperMathContext.build_d10_from_p
